name: AWS RDS Snapshot Successfully Restored
description: The alert of this model indicates that a restoration has occurred from an AWS RDS snapshot. This suggests potential attempts to roll back data or configurations due to a previously executed recovery action.From a security standpoint, this event could indicate potential vulnerabilities in the system’s data security measures and could potentially lead to unauthorized access to sensitive data or compromises of database reliability. This event could affect data security, system stability, and overall operational continuity.
author: Srivathsa H S and Sunil Bharti
